raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs tee Wihri / un
nogahje / un Josuirs pawehleja
teem/ kas nogahje to Semmi us-
rakstiht/un fazzija: Eite/un pahr-
staigajt to Semmi/ un usrakstajt
to/ un atgreeseetees pee mannim/
tad mesfloschu es preeksch jums
fcheit preelfch ta KUNGA eeksch
Sihlus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nogahje tee Wihri / un
pahrstaigaja to Semmi/ un us-
rakstiha to pehz laweem Pilstah-
teem / feptinas Dattas / kahda
Grahmatā / un nahze atpakkat
pee Josuirs us to Lehgeri eeksch
Sihlus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad metfloja Josuirs preeksch
winzeem eeksch Sihlus preeksch
ta KUNGA / un Josuirs dallija
tur teim Israēta Behrneem to
Semmi pehz sawahin Dattahn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta nomeflota Teefa/
Benjamixa Behrnu Zilts/ pehz
winzo Saimehn / un ta Rohbe-
scha winzo nomeflotas Teefas/
steepjabs zaur Juhda Behrneem/
un zaur Jahsepa Behrneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un winnu Rohbescha bija
fahnis prett Seemetā Buffes/ no
Jardanas/ un fchi Rohbescha tekt
auscha fahnis Jerikus no See-
meta Buffes / un steepjabs zaur
Calneemi prett Wakkara
un winnas Gals irr pee
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un no turrenes eet ta Roh-
beschazaur us Lufu/ fahnis Luf-
schi irr Beteie prett Deenas Wi-
dn / un ta Rohbeschach noteke
Atarot-Ahdaru/pee ta Kalna/ka
Deenas Widdus puffē no Letja
Bet-Ohrona irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un fchi Rohbeschach steepjal
un greeschahs us to Wakka-
Stuhri prett Deenas-Widdi
ne ta Kalna / kas Bet-Ohrona
pretti / prett Deenas Widdu ir-
un winnas Gals irr pee Kiria
Baālas / fchi irr Kiriat-Jearin
weens Juhda Behrnu Pillsfahte
fchis irr tas Stuhris prett Wa-
kara Puft.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Stuhris prett De-
nas Widdu steepjahs lihds ta-
Gallam / no Kiriat-Jearin/ u-
fchi Rohbeschach nahk ahra pre-
Wakkara Puft/ un istekk us
Awotu/ ta NewtoasUhdens.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un fchi Rohbeschach no-e-
lihds ta Kalna Gallam / kas t-
Innomā Dehla Eeleijai pretti ir-
kas eeksch to Milsu Eeleijas i-
prett Seemeli / un no-eet zaur
Innoma Dehla Eeleiju / fahn-
teem Jebusiteeem/ prett Deena-
Widdu/ un notekk lihdstain R-
geles Awotam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un steepjahs no Seeme-
Puffes/un nahkahra us En-Se-
mes/ un istekk us Gelilotu / fo-
prett Adaminis steepjahs / un u-
tekk us to Akminnu Boēna/ Ru-
bena Dehla.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
